name: FHE Feature Extraction
purpose: TenSEAL CKKS-based encrypted feature extraction over biomedical signal vectors — statistical operations (sum, mean, variance, dot-product) execute entirely on ciphertext; raw data never leaves its origin.

name: DP LLM Training
purpose: Opacus wrapper that injects calibrated Gaussian noise during gradient descent and tracks cumulative (ε, δ) privacy budget per epoch — makes individual-record contribution to model weights formally bounded.

name: LLM Leakage Assessment
purpose: Seven-category threat taxonomy and structured assessment checklist covering prompt injection, training-data extraction, membership inference, system-prompt extraction, log capture, embedding inversion, and indirect injection.

name: Governance Templates
purpose: Reusable data-minimization and pre-export review checklists for institutions operating under HIPAA, GDPR Article 9, Sweden's Patientdatalag, and equivalent data-governance frameworks.
